title: Configure CAN bit timing and respect arbitration
description: Set the sample point and bit-timing segments consistently across all nodes so arbitration and acknowledgement work.
body: Use when bringing up a CAN bus or diagnosing error frames. Do not let nodes run mismatched bit timing, because even small sample-point differences cause sporadic errors. Actions: compute the segments for the target bitrate, set the same sample point on every node, and verify acknowledgement bits appear on a capture. Validation signals include a clean transmission with a received ACK slot and an error counter that does not climb under load. Risk boundary: a node that loses arbitration repeatedly can go bus-off and drop a safety-critical link, so escalate timing mismatches before deployment.
